experience.description: Validated Virtual Threads and Prime-specific JVM enhancements using JTReg stress and regression tests. Built an LLM-assisted commit bisection tool containerized with Docker and deployed on OpenStack, reducing triage time by 90%. Debugged concurrency and runtime failures across nightly JVM builds.
Built an offline-first mobile cash-flow prediction app for SMEs using Jetpack Compose and MVVM architecture with Room database, including Excel import to reduce manual data entry by 70%.
Built an NLP-based RAG system for financial document Q&A using LangChain and Weaviate vector database. Automated query generation using a T5 model, reducing manual testing effort by 60%.
